creator: jef@math.miami.edu
text:
The mimedefang port is stale.  The newer version potentially solves a problem
where mimedefang does not properly start upon reboot.  In this condition, no
incoming mail will be delivered until the process is manually restarted.  So
it's basically a DoS for incoming mail, which is pretty important.

Fix: 

Update the port.
How-To-Repeat: The port is listed as mimedefang-2.64_1 but <http://www.mimedefang.org> shows
2.67 as the latest.
